_comment: EXAMPLE submission. Copy this shape, set runtime/weights_id to your own, and fill `submissions` with ONE object per intent in intents.json (same order). The example below shows the `cz` intent fully filled so you can see the exact format. DELETE this _comment and the example object, then add your real answers. Numbers must be plain JSON numbers, not strings.

submissions.golden_code:
import numpy as np
# CZ: -1 phase iff both qubits |1>; diagonal in computational basis (big-endian |q0 q1>)
golden = np.diag([1, 1, 1, -1]).astype(complex)
submissions.construction_method: Diagonal operator placing -1 on the |11> basis state (index 3), identity elsewhere.
submissions.self_check: U @ U.conj().T == I (4x4), shape (4,4), unitary verified.
